name: Golf Pro Delivered
about: Golf Pro Delivered is an authorized independent installer of top golf simulator brands, offering a range of services from residential and commercial simulator sales and installations to 3D design, corporate events, monthly rentals, and indoor putting greens. They provide expert advice with no obligations and can offer solutions from basic kits to fully customized turn-key installations to fit various budgets. The company appears to have a physical location referred to as the Birdies Bar, which is described as one of Long Island's most popular indoor golf simulator bar spots, featuring 6 Foresight GC Hawk simulators, live music, an outdoor beer garden, and multiple floors of entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Foresight GC Hawk golf simulators
One-stop shop for expert advice and unbiased information on top golf simulator brands
Flexible solutions from basic kits to fully customized turn-key installations
Host for corporate events and social gatherings with a lively bar atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Food service is mentioned as a consideration for club layouts and available at the Birdies Bar location.
Full bar service is available at the Birdies Bar location, featuring an outdoor beer garden.

simulator_hardware.notes: Installed at the Birdies Bar location; mentioned as one of Long Island's most popular simulator spots.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a club rental policy, but as a venue with simulator installations, it is likely you can bring your own clubs or arrange for rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The Birdies Bar location serves food and alcohol, so external food and drink policies are not specified. It is a full-service venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for 18 holes, as this can vary greatly depending on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if the venue is kid-friendly, though it does mention family-oriented services like indoor putting greens and events.
